ariaSpec.usage: The focusable wrapper should be considered a textbox with a value that could be submitted.
The component needs an accessible name including the currently selected value.
Rendered only when the ColorGradient is disabled.
The 2D draghandle must have slider role for ARIA-allowed attributes.
The implicit orientation for the slider must be removed for the 2D handle.
Must provide information about the purpose of the slider and the currently selected color.
Must specify the values on both X and Y axis.
Must provide the name of the channel (red, green, blue, or alpha).

kbSpec.behavior: Navigates to the next focusable element on the page.
Navigates to the previous focusable element on the page.
Moves focus back to wrapper element. Deactivates inner ColorGradient navigation.
Navigates to the next focusable element in the ColorGradient. If current focus is on the last element, moves focus to the first focusable item in the component.
Navigates to the previous focusable element in the ColorGradient. If current focus is on the first element, moves focus to the last focusable item in the component.
For button items, ColorGradient executes the currently focused button action.
Moves slider up by large step.
Moves slider down by large step.
Moves slider left by large step.
Moves slider right by large step.
Moves slider up by small step.
Moves slider down by small step.
Moves slider left by small step.
Moves slider right by small step.
